session.assistant:
Now I need to add a test that validates that when the plan-header has `node_ids`, the landing script uses them. I need to use `format_plan_header_body_for_test` to create a proper plan-header body with `node_ids`. But there's a subtlety — the landing script resolves the plan via `plan_backend.get_managed_pr()` which returns a `Plan` object. The plan body in the PR needs the plan-header with `node_ids`.
